description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with a highly stylized and distorted body, featuring elongated, ribbon-like arms that extend dramatically upwards and outwards. The figure has a slender build, with the torso and legs twisted in an exaggerated, almost serpentine pose. The head is small and human-like, with hair styled in a tight bun. The clothing appears to be form-fitting, with visible seams and details suggesting a modern, possibly athletic or tactical outfit. The legs are bent at sharp angles, and the feet are clad in heeled shoes, adding to the dynamic and surreal posture. The overall appearance is both humanoid and abstract, with the extended arms creating a striking visual element.
description: A surreal adult pedestrian with extremely elongated, ribbon-like arms, a twisted torso, and bent legs, dressed in a form-fitting modern outfit and heeled shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, tightly styled hair, and the dramatic upward extension of both arms, with the twisted torso and bent legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length and thinness of the arms, the sharp bend in the legs, and the profile of the head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the bun hairstyle, and the way the arms extend outward from the shoulders, with the back of the legs and shoes visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curvature of the body, the angular legs, and the continuous, ribbon-like arms stretching upwards.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting modern bodysuit with visible seams and heeled footwear
attribute_posture: twisted, dynamic pose with arms extended upward and legs sharply bent
